case_title: SERGIO MUNOZ VS. HIEN NGOC PHAM

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, SERGIO AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, HIEN NGOC , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HIEN'S GENERAL CONSTRUCTION AND LANDSCAPING

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNOZ, SERGIO AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, HIEN NGOC , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HIEN'S GENERAL CONSTRUCTION AND LANDSCAPING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
